title: smoky jowly german cobnuts bake
description: A hearty, smoky German-inspired dish featuring cobnuts, perfect for a solo dinner. The combination of malty flavors and molten texture makes this a satisfying meal.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, grind the cobnuts into a coarse meal.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, caraway seeds, and molasses until well combined.
Add the ground cobnuts, plant-based milk, and vegan butter to the mixing bowl and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough into a thin circle.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and top with the smoked tofu, sliced onion, and flaky sea salt.
Garnish with fresh thyme sprigs and bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5-7 minutes before slicing and serving.
